texto: But really, anybody could die any day, whether you were ready or not. It could be your pet fish or your sister or you. Nothing is the same forever. Maybe all the people on Earth are God's little pet fish. God lives such a long time that people's lives probably seem really short to him. He watches them swim for a little while, and then they stop swimming.
explicacao: Citação de Suzanne LaFleur sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “But really, anybody could die any day, whether you were ready or not. It could be your pet fish o…” articula vida, death, really em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como luto e vida.

frase_original: But really, anybody could die any day, whether you were ready or not. It could be your pet fish or your sister or you. Nothing is the same forever. Maybe all the people on Earth are God's little pet fish. God lives such a long time that people's lives probably seem really short to him. He watches them swim for a little while, and then they stop swimming.

texto: Well, sometimes things don't change on their own. Sometimes we have to change them.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Suzanne LaFleur sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Well, sometimes things don't change on their own. Sometimes we have to change them.” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, change, sometimes, útil em momentos de mudanca e reflexao.
